message:
feat(tui): semantic screen transitions with category awareness and easing (br-1xt0m.1.5.1)

Replace the primitive wipe-bar+label transition with two semantic styles:
- Lateral: thin accent indicator slides in navigation direction for same-category moves
- CrossCategory: centered destination label with category badge for cross-category moves
Both use ease-out cubic curve for natural deceleration. Direction inferred
from tab ordering. Reduced-motion still skips all transitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
